# QA Plan: Sprint 37 — Graph Surfacing Deeper Polish
**Date**: 2026-06-20  
**Generated by**: /qa-plan sprint  
**Scope**: 14 stories across graph surfacing (C2 + Platform Editor) + deeper Polish (perf P2, playtests, hygiene, dispatching refinements) per sprint plan  
**Engine**: Unity 6.3 LTS (C# / .NET 8 headless; PlayMode for Unity adapter + C2 proxies in ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests)  
**Sprint File**: production/sprints/sprint-37-graph-surfacing-deeper-polish.md  
**Trunk**: main @ (post-S36; TBD after S36 closeout)  
**Sprint Dates**: 2026-07-20 to 2026-08-02  
**Review mode**: **Lean** (production/review-mode.txt — PR-SPRINT skipped; parallel domain agents)  
**Authority**: polish-scope-boundary-2026-06-19.md (Phase 2 continuation) + S36  

**Scope Compliance Note (enforced):** Strictly graph surfacing completion + deeper Polish only. NO globe/Cesium production, NO delegation badges/trust UX, NO DOTS/ECS, extend-only on CatalogWriteGate, **ZERO** touch on DelegationBridge.cs (control manifest), production Baltic hash `17144800277401907079` immutable, deterministic/read-only/export-only, headless-first (projections only per ADR-010), C2 proxy ≥18/18+ + frame headroom maintenance, ReplayGolden 6/6, GitNexus on changes, lean mode. Every story must cite polish-scope-boundary-2026-06-19.md + S36. S37-02 (this plan) blocks all waves.

| S37-05 Platform Editor graph surfacing completion (interactive FK/full graph display, tooltips, export polish) | UI (mixed UI+Integration) | Platform*Tests + roundtrip/validation (extend S36 Phase H); export/tooltip projection tests | Evidence PNGs (FK/graph display, tooltips, reverse lookup); roundtrip validation |

| S37-08 Closeout hygiene (smoke, replay 6/6, GitNexus tip, tracker notes) | Integration | Full sln + ReplayGolden 6/6 + GitNexus + proxy gates | Closeout smoke + no-regression audit on S36 |

| S37-10 Playtest session 9 (graph surfacing UX focus + polish feedback) | UI | N/A | Structured report + think-aloud notes in production/playtests/ |

| S37-12 Perf re-profile + polish baseline appendix update | Config/Data | N/A (extend existing if any) | Appendix update to perf-profile-polish-baseline-2026-06-19.md |
| S37-13 Additional C2 / Editor polish (filters, tooltips, residual S36-15 items) | UI | C2 filters / proxy + tooltip projection tests | Proxy pass + notes; no-new-scope spot-checks |
| S37-14 AD-ART-BIBLE sign-off facilitation / UX doc polish (carry) | Config/Data | N/A | Verdict note or sign-off artifact |

**Classification note (per Phase 3):** All types inferred from ACs (no `Type:` in sprint plan). Graph surfacing classified Logic (core index/chains/determinism) or UI (viewer/panel/display/bind/tooltips/interactive per user guidance + ACs; mixed noted). Perf = Logic. Playtest = UI. Dispatching/hygiene baseline/closeout = Integration. Plan/layout/perf-reprofile/art-bible = Config/Data. Mixed risk resolved to primary; Integration conservative on cross-boundary/proxy. All within polish-boundary (graph surfacing + deeper polish only).

## Story Readiness (per /story-readiness skill, QA/Process/Hygiene Track only — isolated)
**Scope:** S37-07, S37-10, S37-11 (from sprint-37 + this qa-plan; no dedicated story-*.md files — process tasks defined in plans)

### Verdicts
- **S37-07 (Integration, dispatching refinements):** **NEEDS WORK**
  - Gaps (checklist):
    - No dedicated story file with embedded GDD req ref (uses polish-boundary + S36 carryover, not design/gdd/ path)

    - Estimate present (sprint); ACs testable but high-level (1 line needs expansion to >=3 per DoD)
    - Dependencies listed (S37-02); no UNRESOLVED; assets N/A
  - Passing: testable ACs, scope boundary clear, engine N/A, min criteria borderline.
  - Fix (not applied — plan authority accepted for process): would draft dedicated story-*.md or mark N/A in plans.
  - Routed: coordinator / c-sharp-devops per dev-story.
  - Post-impl: READY in context (docs updated, backward compat, validated kickoff); implementation complete.

- **S37-10 (UI, playtest 9):** **NEEDS WORK**
  - Gaps: No story file (plan-defined); GDD/ADR absent (UI evidence via playtest report per qa); Type inferred UI.
  - Passing: AC clear ("Structured report + ... in production/playtests/"); deps (S37-02); evidence path explicit; >=2 criteria (report + notes).
  - Subjective OK for UI/Visual with evidence ref.
  - Post-impl: READY (report produced with graph UX focus: C2/Editor visibility, highlights, tooltips, density, frame cross-check + polish feedback; README corpus update).

- **S37-11 (Config/Data, tests hygiene):** **NEEDS WORK**
  - Gaps: No story file; no GDD/ADR/TR; Type inferred Config/Data in qa.
  - Passing: Estimate, deps (S37-01), scope (hygiene only), 1+ AC, test evidence = CI verify no breakage.
  - Post-impl: READY (directory-structure.md advanced with signed hybrid retention + CI sim PASS >= baseline; qa-plan status; no moves to avoid sln breakage; 0 regression).

**Aggregate:** Ready: 0 (pre-impl, formal files) | Needs Work: 3 | Blocked: 0
**Escalation:** None (Should Have tier; no Must Have in this isolated track). Plan + qa-plan treated as authority per S37 kickoff dispatch rule. Lean mode: no full QL gates.
**After readiness:** /dev-story dispatched (load context from plans; route to team-qa + c-sharp-devops-engineer + team-ui + coordinator for W4 only).
**All within boundary/lean:** Yes. Polish-scope + lean + no cross-track.

**Implementation summary (dev-story Phase 6):** See updated kickoff + session-state. Docs/reports updated; CI sim PASS; no breakage. S37-08 handled in capacity.

## Automated Tests Required

### S37-01 Full-solution re-baseline post-S36 + GitNexus + ReplayGolden 6/6 + test count bump — Integration
**Test file path**: Existing baselines + `src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests` (ReplayGoldenSuiteTests) + GitNexus harness + smoke doc  
**What to test**:
- Full solution `dotnet test` ≥1215 PASS (post-S36 bump from ≥1204)
- ReplayGolden 6/6 (engage, classify, stale, readiness, spoof, replay)
- GitNexus index + detect_changes at trunk tip; indexed commit recorded
- Smoke doc produced; no regressions on S36 deliverables
**Edge cases to cover**:
- Baseline drift after S36 merges
- Replay divergence on production Baltic pin (hash `17144800277401907079` immutable)
- GitNexus node/edge stability on graph changes (S37-03)
*No formula found in referenced GDD — test cases derived from ACs + polish-scope-boundary + perf baseline. Review before writing.*

### S37-02 Sprint 37 QA plan (graph surfacing matrix, C2 proxy extensions, dispatching validation, playtest protocol) — Config/Data
**Test file path**: N/A (meta; this document)  
**What to test**:
- N/A — document existence + merge before feature waves (S37-03+)
**Edge cases to cover**:
- N/A (plan must block waves per sprint "Prerequisites" + "QA Plan Gate")
*This plan itself is the deliverable per AC. Enforces lean mode + polish-boundary for all subsequent waves.*

### S37-03 CatalogDependencyGraphIndex + CLI full kill-chain surfacing (platform→link + weapon→mount→sensor chains + API) — Logic
**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/...` (CatalogDependencyGraphIndexTests, KillChain/Dependency edge coverage + invalidation) + `src/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests` (CatalogDependencyGraphCommand goldens)  
**What to test**:
- Full chains in `GetSortedDependencyEdges()` / GetSorted* (platform→link + weapon→mount→sensor; extend existing PlatformToSensor/PlatformToMountToWeapon)
- Deterministic export (stable Ordinal sort, canonical lines, JSON payload parity); goldens updated
- CLI `catalog_dependency_graph` emits full kill-chain (e.g., `link:{PlatformId}:{LinkId}:{CommsFittingId}`, weapon/mount/sensor lines unchanged)
- API coverage + tests pass; hash/world-state/goldens unchanged for Baltic fixtures
- Invalidation on Approve* (extend NotifyDependencyGraphCommitted)
**Edge cases to cover**:
- Zero/empty comms/links/mounts/weapons/sensors
- Orphan LINK cases + staging overlay deltas (CatalogStagingOverlayReader)
- Mixed edge kinds in one call; invalid review_state (only approved)
- Production Baltic hash immutable; extend-only on CatalogWriteGate (no direct mutation)
- GitNexus impact + /replay-verify on changes
**Estimated test count**: ~13+ new (mirroring S33/S36 precedent) + invalidation + full-chain rows. (Inferred from existing CatalogDependencyGraphCommand + S37-03 AC + ADR-006/011 + polish-boundary.)

### S37-04 C2 graph surfacing completion — dependency viewer/panel, selection highlights, link-chain display + bind — UI (mixed Logic+UI)
**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests` (extended C2 proxy filters e.g. PlayModeSmoke|C2Selection|...|Graph* + projection bind tests)  
**What to test**:
- C2 proxy filters extended with new graph checks; 18/18+ maintained (headless primary per lean/ADR-010)
- Graph data (dependency viewer/panel, selection highlights, link-chain display) visible via projections in headless + live; bind works
- Selection + link-chain display + highlights do not regress existing C2 paths
**Edge cases to cover**:
- No graph data (empty/zero chains → graceful empty or note)
- Destroyed unit or replay mode (read-only, no mutation)
- Frame spike risk on bind/highlights (measure vs 16.67 ms; gate via S37-06)
- Proxy regression or 18/18+ drop
- ZERO DelegationBridge touch; read-only projections only (ADR-010)
**Estimated test count**: Proxy extensions + bind assertions. (Inferred from C2 GDD, c2-automated-proxy, command-and-control-ui.md, polish-boundary "C2 18/18+".)

### S37-05 Platform Editor graph surfacing completion (interactive FK/full graph display, tooltips, export polish) — UI (mixed UI+Integration)
**Test file path**: Platform*Tests (extend S36 Phase H: PlatformLinkCatalogTests, PlatformCommsTests, viewer projection + roundtrip) + validation/export tests  
**What to test**:
- Full graph visible (interactive FK/full graph display beyond S36-07 read-only); tooltips + reverse lookup
- Roundtrip + validation tests PASS (empty-diff golden per ADR-011); export polish
- Evidence PNGs captured
**Edge cases to cover**:
- Link without matching comms (grey-out/note)
- Staging diff preview of graph/edge count
- Read-only (no write paths); extend-only CatalogWriteGate
- Roundtrip determinism (InvariantCulture, stable keys)
**Estimated test count**: FK/graph assertions + roundtrip cases. (Inferred from ADR-011 + S37-05 AC + S36 Phase H precedent.)

### S37-06 Unity C2 frame budget deeper remediation + additional live evidence refresh — Logic
**Test file path**: UnityAdapter.Tests panel-bind/filter timing + proxy filters (no new spikes)  
**What to test**:
- Sustained frame headroom vs 16.67 ms budget after graph surfacing work
- Perf doc update; new evidence batch (post-S36)
- No regression on prior C2 paths
**Edge cases to cover**:
- Frame spikes on dependency viewer/panel/highlights/bind (S37-04/05)
- Editor vs playmode differences
- Hash-identical behavior
(Per perf-profile-polish-baseline-2026-06-19.md + S37-06 AC + polish-boundary.)

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before any QA hand-off for this sprint (lean mode; headless-first; preserve gates):

1. Game launches to main menu without crash
2. New game / new session can be started (Baltic fixture)
3. Full-solution re-baseline gate (≥1215 PASS; GitNexus indexed; smoke doc)
4. ReplayGolden 6/6 suite PASS (no divergence on engage/classify/stale/readiness/spoof/replay)
5. C2 headless proxy ≥18/18+ (extended filters for new graph checks; PlayModeSmoke|C2Selection|...|Graph* etc.; 18/18+ maintained)
6. Graph surfacing visible + tested: `GetSortedDependencyEdges` full kill-chains (platform→link + weapon→mount→sensor); CLI emits correct lines; C2 dependency viewer/panel + highlights + link-chain display + bind (headless primary); Platform Editor interactive FK/graph/tooltips (read-only)
7. Production Baltic hash `17144800277401907079` unchanged (immutable)
8. ZERO diff on `DelegationBridge.cs`; CatalogWriteGate extend-only only
9. Performance within budget: sustained C2 frame headroom vs 16.67 ms; no new spikes from graph work; hash-identical for perf P2
10. Smoke check passes (run `/smoke-check sprint` before QA hand-off); all waves green before closeout S37-08

*Smoke tests verified by developer via `/smoke-check`. All merges must preserve ReplayGolden + C2 proxy + Baltic pin + polish-boundary + lean mode. Graph surfacing + deeper polish only — no out-of-scope.*

## Playtest Requirements

| Story | Playtest Goal | Min Sessions | Target Player Type |
|-------|---------------|--------------|--------------------|
| S37-10 Playtest session 9 | Validate graph surfacing UX (dependency visibility, link-chain clarity, selection/highlights, Editor display/tooltips) + broader polish feedback (C2 feel, responsiveness) | 1 | Experienced (prior Baltic/C2) or new as needed |
| S37-04 / S37-05 / S37-06 / S37-13 (graph + C2/Editor polish) | Confirm surfacing does not degrade information density, responsiveness, or introduce visual/selection issues (advisory as part of S37-10) | Advisory | Experienced |

**Sign-off requirement**: Playtest notes must be written to `production/playtests/` (or `production/session-logs/playtest-sprint-37-*.md`) and reviewed by qa-lead / designer before the story can be marked COMPLETE. Per lean polish mode.

If no stories require playtest validation: *S37-10 is explicitly scheduled; graph surfacing UX focus per sprint plan.*

---

## Definition of Done — This Sprint

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified — via automated test result OR documented manual evidence (screenshot, video, or playtest notes with sign-off)
- [ ] Test file exists at the specified path for all Logic and Integration stories (graph index/CLI/C2 proxy/proxy extensions, replay gates, hash-identical, etc.)
- [ ] Manual evidence document exists for all Visual/Feel and UI stories (PNGs, frame docs, viewer screenshots, playtest report, perf appendix, verdict)
- [ ] Smoke check passes (run `/smoke-check sprint` before QA hand-off) — replay 6/6, C2 ≥18/18+, graph surfacing landed + tested (headless primary), ≥1215, no regression
- [ ] No regressions introduced (Baltic hash immutable, DelegationBridge untouched, existing filters/goldens/proxies, frame budget, determinism)
- [ ] Code reviewed (via `/code-review` or documented peer review)
- [ ] Story file updated to `Status: Complete` (via `/story-done`)
- [ ] Parallel track closeout (S37-08) confirms all waves green
- [ ] Polish-boundary compliance: every deliverable cites `polish-scope-boundary-2026-06-19.md` + S36; lean mode observed; no scope creep (no globe, no badges, no DOTS, extend-only, ZERO DelegationBridge)

**Sprint gates (from plan)**: All Must Have; QA plan (S37-02) merged **before** waves; smoke; replay 6/6; C2 proxy ≥18/18+ + frame improvements; graph surfacing visible + tested in C2 + Platform Editor; test baseline ≥1215; dispatching landed; no S1/S2 bugs. Authority: polish-scope-boundary-2026-06-19.md (Phase 2) + lean mode.

**team-qa Sprint 37 Note (post S37-02, Polish lean review, 2026-07-20)**: 
This QA plan fulfills team-qa Phase 3 (test plan) requirements in full (scope, story classification table per Phase 2, automated/manual reqs, entry/exit criteria incl. smoke UNKNOWN handling as PASS WITH WARNINGS, out-of-scope explicit, DoD). No regeneration needed; S37-02 delivered it pre-waves. Evidence verification (Phases 4/5) and sign-off (Phase 6) to follow in separate `qa-signoff-sprint-37-*.md`. All stories advanced by parallel agents per kickoff + session-state extracts; S37-08 pending. Enforces lean, polish-boundary, no S1/S2. (Appended during /team-qa execution.)
